title: Build SKILL derivation script + prebuild hook
description: scripts/build-skills.ts reads templates/skill-source/fabric-init/SOURCE.md + clients.json → emits two committed SKILL.md files at templates/claude-skills/fabric-init/SKILL.md and templates/codex-skills/fabric-init/SKILL.md (note: outputName unified to fabric-init for BOTH clients). Hooked into pnpm prebuild script. Runtime init.ts continues to copyFile from templates/ — does NOT need to know about derivation.
scope: Layer 0 infrastructure — build pipeline that produces per-client SKILL artifacts

files.change: NEW: read SOURCE.md, parse clients.json, for each client emit `${outputDir}/${outputName}/SKILL.md` with rendered frontmatter + body
Add `build:skills`: 'tsx scripts/build-skills.ts'; add `prebuild`: 'pnpm build:skills' to chain before existing build
NEW (generated artifact, committed): Claude-targeted SKILL with frontmatter from clients.json + body from SOURCE.md
REGENERATE (was 27 lines, replaced with full parity content from SOURCE.md)
DELETE: replaced by templates/claude-skills/fabric-init/SKILL.md (legacy path migrated by TASK-033 doctor check)

criteria: pnpm build:skills produces two SKILL.md files matching frontmatter spec
Generated Claude SKILL.md contains allowed-tools frontmatter; Codex SKILL.md does not
Both generated files have body parity (same content from SOURCE.md)
pnpm prebuild runs build:skills before existing build steps
Generated artifacts checked into repo so PR diffs show user-visible output
